title: Tarragona, Catalonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tarragona, Catalonia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tarragona is a city in Catalonia with a population of 135,000. A Roman gem on the Mediterranean with an incredible amphitheater, aqueduct, and beautiful Catalan coastal lifestyle.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
